listings.title: 200 sq.yd JDA Plot, Jagatpura Extension (Nilay Kunj/Ramnagariya South)
listings.desc: High-demand residential plot near the upcoming Metro Phase-1C extension route.

ai_report.recommendation: Avoid for immediate move-in; Hold if you have black money to park.
ai_report.infra: 3km from the proposed Jhalana Bypass elevated road and upcoming Metro extension.
ai_report.catalysts: Completion of the 2nd phase of the elevated road and Metro connectivity to Sitapura.
ai_report.civilization: Schools like Jayshree Periwal are nearby, but hospitals are over-leveraged. The area is a 'concrete heat island' with zero parks that aren't encroached.
ai_report.utilities: Bisalpur water is a pipe dream here; you will pay ₹800 per tanker forever. Sewerage overflows every monsoon.

listings.title: 166 sq.yd JDA Plot, Mahindra SEZ (Ajmer Road Enclave)
listings.desc: Plot in a gated 'township' near the Ring Road-Ajmer Road cloverleaf.

ai_report.recommendation: Buy only if you work in Infosys/Genpact; otherwise, it's an isolated island.
ai_report.infra: Adjacent to the Delhi-Jaipur Super Expressway terminal point.
ai_report.catalysts: Full operationalization of the Ring Road Northern corridor and NHAI logistics hub.
ai_report.civilization: Elite schools (Step by Step) are 15km away. Nightlife is non-existent. It’s a 'ghost town' after 8 PM with high stray dog density.
ai_report.utilities: Groundwater is hard and receding. Electricity is stable, but private maintenance charges will bleed you dry.

listings.title: 250 sq.yd JDA Plot, Chimanpura (Sikar Road Extension)
listings.desc: Budget investment plot near the Northern Ring Road transport corridor.

ai_report.recommendation: Hold. This is a 10-year play. Do not build a house here yet.
ai_report.infra: Under the direct impact zone of the NHAI Northern Ring Road project.
ai_report.catalysts: Shift of the main transport nagar and heavy vehicle traffic to the Northern Ring Road.
ai_report.civilization: Zero civilization. It's currently farmland and godowns. Closest decent hospital is in Vidhyadhar Nagar (12km).
ai_report.utilities: Borewell water only—highly saline. No government sewerage; septic tanks are the only reality.
sources: Bhaskar English Real Estate Action Report

listings.title: 150 sq.yd JDA Plot, Near Narayan Singh Circle (Central Jaipur)
listings.desc: Rare corner plot in a high-density zone being converted to signal-free.

ai_report.recommendation: Buy for commercial use; Avoid for residential due to insane noise.
ai_report.infra: Directly benefits from the removal of the Narayan Singh Circle footbridge and new signal-free corridors.
ai_report.catalysts: The 'Delhi Model' signal-free implementation by JDA.
ai_report.civilization: Heart of the city. Everything is within 1km. But you will breathe PM2.5 for breakfast.
ai_report.utilities: Old Bisalpur lines (frequent leaks). Drainage is 40 years old and chokes regularly.

listings.title: 200 sq.yd JDA Plot, Sanganer (Near New Elevated Road)
listings.desc: Plot near the OTS Crossing/Sanganer elevated road project site.

ai_report.recommendation: Buy now before the elevated road construction makes the area inaccessible for 3 years.
ai_report.infra: Walking distance to the new Sanganer-OTS elevated corridor.
ai_report.catalysts: Completion of the elevated road which will cut travel time to Tonk Road by 20 mins.
ai_report.civilization: High civilization but chaotic. Markets are cramped. Proximity to airport means permanent noise pollution.
ai_report.utilities: Good Bisalpur coverage compared to Jagatpura. Electricity is fine, but the lanes are too narrow for fire tenders.

infrastructure.name: Jaipur Ring Road (Southern & Northern Phase)
infrastructure.utility_status: Industrial power ready; Water tankers are the only god.
infrastructure.desc: Deep AI Insight: It is a 'Highway to Nowhere' for residents. While logistics and godowns are booming, the residential pockets are 'ghost sectors' with no streetlights and high crime risk at night. Do not be fooled by the 65% price surge—it's purely speculative flip-trading among brokers.

infrastructure.name: Shivdaspura Aero City / Junction
infrastructure.utility_status: No sewerage, no Bisalpur, high litigation risk.
infrastructure.desc: Deep AI Insight: The 'Aero City' tag is a marketing scam. Ground reality: Land acquisition is stuck in legal hell. Most 'plots' sold here are on society pattas which the government just stopped registering. If you buy here, you aren't an investor; you're a gambler with bad odds.
